classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪为引脚定义表，列出Pin、Fuction、COLOR，并将1至17号针脚对应到'R+'、'R-'、'COS+'、'COS-'、'SIN+'、'SIN-'、'NC'及线色；完整标注源图中该区域标题为'17 PIN Encoder Connector'，属于编码器反馈连接器信号针脚分配。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形17针连接器正面针位编号图，标注型号'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'；结合源图中该区域所属标题'17 PIN Encoder Connector'，其工程含义为编码器反馈接口针位布局，最接近反馈连接器针脚定义类别。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected 'm' with low confidence (0.745291). Visual inspection shows this is pin number '1' inside a circular pin layout. Corrected based on engineering context of 17-pin connector numbering.

OCR detected 'C' with very low confidence (0.474268). Visual inspection shows this is pin number '6' inside a circular pin layout. Corrected based on engineering context of 17-pin connector numbering.

terminology_notes: OCR heavily misidentified pin numbers due to small font size and circular arrangement
translation_notes: Pin numbers corrected from OCR errors 'm' and 'C' to '1' and '6' based on visual inspection and engineering context

dimension_records.reason: Pin number identification within 17-pin connector layout. OCR misread as 'm' but visual context and connector pin layout confirm this is pin number 1.
Pin number identification within 17-pin connector layout. OCR misread as 'C' but visual context and connector pin layout confirm this is pin number 6.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 17-pin encoder connector with YL221ZJ model designation. Pin numbering layout shows circular arrangement with pins numbered 1-17. Only pins 1 and 6 were detected by OCR in this cropped region. Complete pin layout and assignment table available in full drawing context.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Majority of pin numbers (2-5, 7-17) not detected by OCR in this region crop. Pin function assignments, electrical specifications, and mating connector details not visible in this region.

unresolved_items.description: OCR quality extremely low due to small font size and circular text arrangement. Only 2 out of 17 expected pin numbers detected. Full pin numbering (1-17) visible in context image but not extracted by OCR.
unresolved_items.reason: OCR limitations with small, circularly-arranged text
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Manual verification recommended. Refer to full drawing context or enlarge target region for complete pin number extraction.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是带有 'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR' 列的6针连接器接线表，行内明确给出针脚1至6与'U'、'V'、'W'、'PE'、'NC'及线色'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN'的对应关系；完整图中该区域属于'6 Pin Power Connector'，符合动力连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是6针连接器外形和孔位编号示意，显示型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'及'6 PIN'，但目标区域内没有针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器外形/结构信息归入机械尺寸类。

overall_envelope_and_clearance.summary_en: Region shows 6-pin circular power connector (model YL2046ZJ-Y) with numbered pin positions 1-6. Pin 1 at top center, pins arranged in circular pattern with pin 4 at center. Exact dimensions require reference to full drawing or manufacturer datasheet.
overall_envelope_and_clearance.summary_zh: 区域显示6针圆形电源连接器(型号YL2046ZJ-Y),针脚位置编号为1-6。1号针位于顶部中心,针脚呈圆形排列,4号针位于中心。确切尺寸需要参考完整图纸或制造商数据表。

connector_considerations.summary_en: 6-pin power connector YL2046ZJ-Y with specific pin numbering sequence. Pin 1 is top center reference point. Pin arrangement follows circular pattern: 1 (top center), 2 (upper right), 3 (upper left), 4 (center), 5 (lower right), 6 (lower left). Mating connector must match this exact pin configuration.
connector_considerations.summary_zh: 6针电源连接器YL2046ZJ-Y,具有特定的针脚编号顺序。1号针是顶部中心参考点。针脚排列遵循圆形图案:1(顶部中心)、2(右上)、3(左上)、4(中心)、5(右下)、6(左下)。配对连接器必须匹配此确切的针脚配置。

missing_or_unresolved_data.summary_en: Connector housing diameter, pin diameters, pin pitch, and mounting dimensions not visible in this detail region. Full specifications require reference to complete drawing or manufacturer datasheet.
missing_or_unresolved_data.summary_zh: 此详图区域中看不到连接器外壳直径、针脚直径、针脚间距和安装尺寸。完整规格需要参考完整图纸或制造商数据表。

unresolved_items.description_zh: 此区域未指定连接器外径

unresolved_items.recommended_action_zh: 参考完整图纸上下文以获取连接器外壳尺寸

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机'Tecnical Data'参数表，包含'Rated Torque Tn (N.m)'、'Rated Speed Nn (rpm)'、'Maximum torque Tm (N.m)'、额定功率和电流等性能参数；虽非曲线图，但在给定类别中与电机转矩、转速性能数据最接近。

regions.group_name: 电机外形及安装尺寸图

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域展示电机侧视图和端面视图，含外形长度、轴径、法兰孔位、安装孔、螺纹深度及连接器外形位置等尺寸标注，如 '374±1.5'、'φ114.3'、'4-φ13'、'M8 Deep 25'、'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'、'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'。图中虽出现连接器名称，但未给出引脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected ? to φ, kept higher confidence reading
Corrected 9 to 6 based on visual inspection
Reconstructed from 42-0.016 to standard tolerance notation

terminology_notes: Common OCR corrections applied: ? to φ, -0.xxx interpreted as negative tolerance

dimension_records.reason: Keyway dimension, OCR read as 9 but corrected to 6

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Mounting flange φ200±0.15 with 4-φ13 holes at 45° spacing, bolt circle 2-180, flange dimensions 79±0.1 and 84.5±1. Mounting threads M8 deep 25.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft φ42 0/-0.016, shaft extension 12mm. Mounting section φ114.3 0/-0.035. Keyway 6mm long, positioned 8mm from shaft end.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Total length 374±1.5, maximum envelope 204MAX. Body sections 65mm each, connector section 17mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 6-pin motor connector and 17-pin encoder connector at rear.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Keyway width not specified. Source_id ocr_002 (D), ocr_004 (NId9), ocr_014 (C), ocr_022 (P), ocr_026 (厂) appear to be OCR noise or partial reads and were excluded.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.21), likely OCR fragment or structural artifact
Unclear meaning, possibly misread connector label or part number fragment
Single letter with moderate confidence, no clear engineering context
Low confidence fragment, likely structural or noise
Chinese character fragment, likely misread structural line
Already merged into T010 as part of tolerance notation
Already merged into T014 as Deep 25

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸左下角的性能曲线区域，包含纵轴扭矩单位 'T (N.m)'、横轴转速单位 'n (rpm)'、连续区 'Continuous'、间歇区 'Intermittent' 以及 48、52.8、120、132、2300 等扭矩和转速标注，表达电机扭矩随转速变化关系。

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This drawing presents torque-speed characteristics with two operating modes: intermittent duty (132 N.m starting torque) and continuous duty (52.8 N.m starting torque). Maximum speed is 2300 rpm for intermittent mode. The continuous curve shows constant torque until approximately 1500 rpm, then declines. Y-axis scale markers from 0 to 140 N.m. X-axis scale markers from 0 to 3000 rpm.

classification.reason: 目标框位于整图右下角标题栏上方的表格区域，内容为'Rating conditions'，其中'Mounting'给出'Aluminum flange 457x457x12.7mm'，明确描述安装法兰材料和外形尺寸；虽包含温升条件，但主要工程含义与安装法兰尺寸相关，最接近机械尺寸类别。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
